title: Marketplace Manager - StayVista South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - StayVista South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the StayVista South Asia Partners family as a Marketplace Manager in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About StayVista South Asia Partners:
StayVista South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StayVista South Asia Partners!
